summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of updated Judo Klub Izola website. Tested all requested features including hero scroll functionality, navigation, gallery lightbox with event cards, mobile menu, and footer links. One minor issue found with hero image click functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Hero image click scroll to news section not working - overlay elements intercept click
ui_bugs.workaround: Hero 'Preberi novice' button works correctly for same functionality

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with full-screen hero section
Hero 'Preberi novice' button scrolls to news section smoothly
Navigation between all 4 pages (Domov, O nas, Galerija, Kontakt) works perfectly
Gallery event card opens lightbox with all photos correctly
Gallery lightbox navigation (prev/next buttons) works smoothly
Gallery thumbnails work to switch between photos
Mobile menu opens and closes properly
Mobile navigation to all pages works correctly
Footer links to all pages work correctly
News article displays full Andrea Leški content
Gallery shows events as cards instead of individual photos
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Website is fully responsive on mobile and desktop viewports
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix hero image click functionality - the overlay text elements are intercepting clicks on the background image. Consider adjusting z-index or click event handling.
